subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Báqir! From time immemorial unto eternity have men clung fast unto their vain imaginings, circling round their idol [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل باقر لم یزل و لایزال ناس بظنون متمسک بودند و طائف حول او خلیل آمد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
